name: Inure App Manager (Trial)
description: Inure is a powerful open source applications manager and analyzer with a good-looking and easy to use interface. This app can be used to manage all apps installed in the device, in addition to that Inure allows you to access all the core components of the app including services, activities etc. and modify them on the go. All that combined with a gorgeous and pleasing interface, with every tap accompanied by fluid animations.
